name: Crockpot Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in crock pot.
2. Set to low heat and let simmer for the entire day.
3. Serve sauce over rice or mashed potatoes.
While not gourmet fare, this is the type of home cooking that is very tasty, economical, and easy to do for the person who is very busy and wants to put a good dinner on the table for the family. Enjoy!
